'''Vilhon''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was a game preserve and was a location for the annual [[Vor-cal]] safari hunt. Each house maintains a hunting lodge in orbit around the forest moon of Vilhon. [[House Melantha]]'s [[House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge|hunting lodge]] was used for the Vor-cal when they hosted the event prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].<ref name="LOTE" />

{{Moon-stub}}
